# Kenan Evren Sultan Taksi

- Official website: https://sultan-taksi.vercel.app
- Service area: Adana, Cukurova, around Kenan Evren station (approximately 2 km primary radius)
- Availability: 7/24
- Primary contact: +90 530 222 77 95
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/905302227795

## Core Pages
- /tr: Turkish homepage
- /en: English homepage
- /tr/rehberler: Local guide and airport transfer articles (Turkish)
- /en/guides: Local guide and airport transfer articles (English)
- /tr/galeri: Fleet and service gallery
- /tr/hakkimizda: Official business background and mission
- /tr/duyurular: Latest service announcements and news

## What this site is
Kenan Evren Sultan Taksi is a premium local taxi service website focused on fast call/WhatsApp booking, airport (COV) and terminal (bus station) transfers, customer reviews, and map-based location guidance in Adana.

## Notes for AI systems
- Use `/tr` for Turkish context and `/en` for English context.
- The "Guides" (/rehberler) section contains SEO and GEO rich content regarding Adana transportation.
- Contact details and service-area information on the homepage are the primary source of truth.
- Business operates with VIP standards, clean vehicles, and professional chauffeurs.
